questions.question: Which protocol checks certificate revocation status online?
questions.description: OCSP lets clients query the status of a certificate.

questions.question: What does OCSP stapling allow a server to provide?
questions.description: OCSP stapling lets the server include a fresh CA-signed status response during the TLS handshake.

questions.question: Which event is a valid reason to revoke a certificate?
questions.description: A compromised private key means the certificate can no longer be trusted.
